coreMeaning.en: flapped or moved with light, rapid motions

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: flux → 拉丁：流动→不断变化

coreMeaning.en: to move through air; a flying insect
tending to fly away; carelessly styled

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: fly+er → 飞的人→飞行者；传单（飞散的纸）

coreMeaning.en: an overpass; a flight over an area

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: fly+over → 飞越→立交桥；低空表演
fly+paper → 粘苍蝇的纸→粘蝇纸

coreMeaning.en: a route used by migratory birds

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: fly+way → 飞行路线→候鸟迁徙路径

coreMeaning.en: a heavy rotating wheel used to store energy

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: fly+wheel → 飞速转动的轮→飞轮
fly+weight → 像飞一样轻的→轻量级

coreMeaning.en: a mass of small bubbles; to form bubbles

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: foam → 古英语：泡沫→白色泡沫

coreMeaning.en: a young horse; to give birth (of a horse)
young horses; gives birth to a foal
a device or bird that catches flies

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: fly+catch+er → 捕蝇的工具→捕蝇鸟

coreMeaning.en: a blank page at the beginning or end of a book

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: fly+leaf → 书的飞页→衬页（扉页）

coreMeaning.en: a ceremonial flight past a point

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: fly+past → 飞越而过→飞行表演

coreMeaning.en: a whisk for driving away flies

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: fly+whisk → 驱赶苍蝇的工具→拂尘
flyer+s → 多张传单；多名飞行员
flyte → 古苏格兰：言词争论
